about.representation: FHIRPath invariants (FHIR ElementDefinition.constraint style: key/severity/human/expression/source) evaluated over the plain KDK Datenkranz JSON with fhirpathpy — the DK is not FHIR, but core FHIRPath is data-model-agnostic. Each expression MUST evaluate to boolean true for a valid case. %context = the document root; config values (le_ids, clinical_data_node_id) are passed as %variables and gated by requires_config.
about.source_document: BfArM 'QS durch KDK' v01.2, Tabelle 1, Kriterien 1-12 (knowledge/bfarm-qs/Qs-KDK.pdf).
about.note: Criteria 6/7 enumerate the date-format paths explicitly (fhirpathpy lacks a reliable descendants()); criterion 4 (terminology) stays with the schema tooling.
about.empty_handling: FHIRPath invariants guard optional fields (X.empty() or …, or (cond and anchor.exists()) implies …): an absent optional value must not fail a rule, matching the primitive engine which skips missing values.
about.date_paths_note: Rules 6/7 enumerate the complete set of format:date instance paths (fhirpathpy has no reliable descendants()); this union is generated from the schema's format:date leaves (24 paths; rule 7 excepts researchConsents.presentationDate + submission.date per QS K7). Regenerate if the schema adds date fields.

invariants.human: Age at report time must be 0-130 years.
submitterId must be a known 64e LE id.
Index must consent to sequencing (permit + mvSequencing).
TNM must have exactly one T, one N and one M.
invariants.expression: case.diagnosisOd.tnmClassifications.exists() implies (case.diagnosisOd.tnmClassifications.where((display | text | code).where($this.matches('(^|[^A-Za-z])[cpyra]*T[0-9xXi]')).exists()).count() = 1 and case.diagnosisOd.tnmClassifications.where((display | text | code).where($this.matches('(^|[^A-Za-z])[cpyra]*N[0-9xXi]')).exists()).count() = 1 and case.diagnosisOd.tnmClassifications.where((display | text | code).where($this.matches('(^|[^A-Za-z])[cpyra]*M[0-9xXi]')).exists()).count() = 1)

invariants.human: No date may lie before birthDate.
invariants.expression: (case.diagnosisOd.additionalDiagnoses.date | case.diagnosisOd.mainDiagnosis.date | case.diagnosisRd.molecularBoardDecisionDate | case.priorDiagnostics.date | case.priorProcedures.therapyEndDate | case.priorProcedures.therapyResponseDate | case.priorProcedures.therapyStartDate | case.priorRds.diagnosticDate | followUp.followUpOds.additionalDiagnoses.date | followUp.followUpOds.deathDate | followUp.followUpOds.followUpDate | followUp.followUpOds.lastContactDate | followUp.followUpOds.preventiveMeasures.preventiveMeasureDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyEndDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyResponseDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyStartDate | followUp.followUpRds.followUpDate | metaData.molecularBoardDecisionDate | metaData.mvConsent.presentationDate | metaData.mvConsent.scope.date | metaData.researchConsents.presentationDate | metaData.submission.date | plan.carePlanOd.molecularBoardDecisionDate | plan.carePlanRd.molecularBoardDecisionDate).all($this >= %context.metaData.birthDate)

invariants.human: For initial submissions all dates precede molecularBoardDecisionDate; for followup, the follow-up date.
invariants.expression: (metaData.submission.type = 'initial' implies (case.diagnosisOd.additionalDiagnoses.date | case.diagnosisOd.mainDiagnosis.date | case.diagnosisRd.molecularBoardDecisionDate | case.priorDiagnostics.date | case.priorProcedures.therapyEndDate | case.priorProcedures.therapyResponseDate | case.priorProcedures.therapyStartDate | case.priorRds.diagnosticDate | followUp.followUpOds.additionalDiagnoses.date | followUp.followUpOds.deathDate | followUp.followUpOds.followUpDate | followUp.followUpOds.lastContactDate | followUp.followUpOds.preventiveMeasures.preventiveMeasureDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyEndDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyResponseDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyStartDate | followUp.followUpRds.followUpDate | metaData.molecularBoardDecisionDate | metaData.mvConsent.presentationDate | metaData.mvConsent.scope.date | plan.carePlanOd.molecularBoardDecisionDate | plan.carePlanRd.molecularBoardDecisionDate).all($this <= %context.metaData.molecularBoardDecisionDate)) and ((metaData.submission.type = 'followup' and (followUp.followUpOds.followUpDate | followUp.followUpRds.followUpDate).exists()) implies (case.diagnosisOd.additionalDiagnoses.date | case.diagnosisOd.mainDiagnosis.date | case.diagnosisRd.molecularBoardDecisionDate | case.priorDiagnostics.date | case.priorProcedures.therapyEndDate | case.priorProcedures.therapyResponseDate | case.priorProcedures.therapyStartDate | case.priorRds.diagnosticDate | followUp.followUpOds.additionalDiagnoses.date | followUp.followUpOds.deathDate | followUp.followUpOds.followUpDate | followUp.followUpOds.lastContactDate | followUp.followUpOds.preventiveMeasures.preventiveMeasureDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyEndDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyResponseDate | followUp.followUpOds.therapies.therapyStartDate | followUp.followUpRds.followUpDate | metaData.molecularBoardDecisionDate | metaData.mvConsent.presentationDate | metaData.mvConsent.scope.date | plan.carePlanOd.molecularBoardDecisionDate | plan.carePlanRd.molecularBoardDecisionDate).all($this <= (%context.followUp.followUpOds.followUpDate | %context.followUp.followUpRds.followUpDate).first()))

invariants.human: mvConsent.presentationDate must not be after the signature date.
Board decision must not precede MV consent signature.
Consent-gated dates must lie on/after the MV consent signature.
Rare disease excludes panel/WES: libraryType in {wgs, wgs_lr, none}.
clinicalDataNodeId must equal the receiving KDK's own id.
noScopeJustification limited to the four patient-related reasons.
invariants.expression: metaData.researchConsents.noScopeJustification.all($this in ('patient unable to consent'|'patient refuses to sign consent'|'patient did not return consent documents'|'other patient-related reason'))
